issue_summary: Added new enum type to replace the integers used to represent the expansion mode. Deprecated methods and contructor that use the old representation.
javadoc_before: /** * Sets the expansionMode. The specified value must be one of * ADDITIVE_MODE, MULTIPLICATIVE_MODE. * * @param expansionMode The expansionMode to set. * @throws MathIllegalArgumentException if the specified mode value is not valid. */
javadoc_after: /** * Sets the expansionMode. The specified value must be one of * ADDITIVE_MODE, MULTIPLICATIVE_MODE. * * @param expansionMode The expansionMode to set. * @throws MathIllegalArgumentException if the specified mode value is not valid. * @deprecated As of 3.1. Please use {@link #setExpansionMode(ExpansionMode)} instead. */
